note: BRAIN layer — Day 24 (Easter Monday, UK bank holiday). NO SENDS TODAY. No new signals to assign — Batch 5 Ryedale scrape not yet executed. pending_batch_5.signal_assignment_note: BRAIN will run waterfall logic on Batch 5 leads once HANDS returns raw scrape data. SSL takes priority over mobile — do not double-assign. AIDA only for leads with confirmed high-volume reviews. Minimum score 55 to email.
pending_batch_5.ryedale_profile_note: Rural North Yorkshire market towns — higher proportion of no-website and legacy-site leads than East Yorkshire coast. Many trades businesses have 10+ year old websites with no SSL, no mobile optimisation. Low digital sophistication = higher signal density = strong conversion potential.

lead_49.action: HANDS: Companies House director name search on 2026-04-22 morning. Use director surname + domain pattern (e.g. j.smith@eastridingbuilders.co.uk). Critical — 21 days blocked is excessive.

lead_51.action: HANDS: phone the business on 2026-04-22 after 09:30 (post-Easter, give them time to open). 'Just need the right address for some information I wanted to send across.'

lead_53.action: HANDS: check Rightmove / Zoopla agent directory for direct email. Try info@ as fallback if no other found.

lead_54.action: HANDS: try info@thewoldsinn.co.uk. Low priority — do after blocked leads 49, 51, 53.

sequences_completed_to_date.note: Leads 4 (Rachel, Skipton Garden Design) and 6 (Boroughbridge Plumbing) sequences assumed complete after fu_020 and fu_021 — HANDS must confirm in CHANGELOG.md.

warm_pipeline_status.lead_22_rob: OUTCOME_UNKNOWN — 17 days since last IMAP check. Nudge sent 2026-04-07. Final close window passed 2026-04-15. Rob expressed strong buying intent (bundle question) — there is a real possibility of an unanswered reply sitting in IMAP.
warm_pipeline_status.lead_1_tom: OUTCOME_UNKNOWN — 17 days since last IMAP check. Nudge sent 2026-04-08. Trades people often reply post-holiday with a clear head. Check IMAP before taking any final close action.

high_probability_imap_reply_window.note: Easter bank holiday pattern: UK B2B owners often scroll email on Easter Sunday/Monday out of habit, then compose replies on Tuesday morning. The 17-day IMAP gap creates a higher-than-normal probability of finding replies on Tuesday sweep. Rob (lead 22) in particular — his question about bundling work was a strong commercial signal and he may have had time to think it over during Easter.
high_probability_imap_reply_window.sweet_spot_for_reply: 2026-04-22 07:00 IMAP sweep — this is peak yield time

summary.pipeline_risk: CRITICAL. 14-day new-lead gap. Batch 5 Ryedale scrape on 2026-04-22 is the single most important action to restore pipeline momentum. Without it, no new initial sends until after 2026-04-25 at the earliest.
summary.entire_active_pipeline_completes: By end of 2026-04-24, all 60+ leads will have been through all 4 touchpoints — the first time a complete campaign dataset exists for analysis.
